title: Day 12 Reflection
description: Solidify Context and immutability before Day 13 dynamic routing.

prompts.question: Why did you choose Context + useReducer instead of prop drilling or lifting state?
prompts.guidance: Mention cart accessed from multiple routes/components.

prompts.question: Show one ADD_ITEM reducer case. How did you avoid mutating state.items?
prompts.guidance: Mention spread, map, or filter returning new arrays.

prompts.question: Did you hit a mutation bug? What did you do wrong and how did you fix it?
prompts.guidance: If not, explain how React DevTools reference equality reveals mutation.

prompts.question: When would Context alone (without useReducer) be enough for cart state?
prompts.guidance: Simple state, few actions — trade-offs vs reducer.

prompts.question: What Context pitfalls will you watch for when the app grows in Week 3?
